title: DynaFLIP: Rethinking Robotics Perception via Tri-Modal-Dynamics Guided Representation
summary: DynaFLIP introduces a framework that learns dynamics-aware visual representations by aligning image transitions, language, and 3D flow. Rather than relying on static visual encoders, it embeds motion understanding into the perception stage using multimodal pre-training with image-language-3D flow triplets. The approach demonstrates consistent performance gains across simulation and real-world manipulation tasks, with improvements reaching +22.5% under out-of-distribution scenarios.
